heading: ClawRich v0.1.1 — Bot API 10.1 Feature Showcase
summary: A generic, privacy-safe demo of every Rich Message element supported by the new Telegram Bot API. No personal data, no real numbers, no real names — just a clean visual tour.

checklist.text: Plugin installed and loaded (openclaw plugins list)
Telegram Bot API 10.1 sendRichMessage endpoint callable

blocks: 🅰️ GitHub direct (works now, no review needed):
First OpenClaw plugin to expose sendRichMessage
4. Telegram parses the Markdown into native elements
5. Native render beats any HTML hack

quotes: Tables are the most requested feature for Telegram bots — and now they actually exist.
This is the first OpenClaw plugin to expose sendRichMessage.

list.text: Bold headers, italic emphasis, inline code — all supported
Nested details blocks for long-form content
Math: e = mc² or ∑(n=1 to ∞) 1/n² = π²/6

paragraphs: This message is a **generic** showcase — no personal data, no live prices, no portfolio numbers, no addresses, no API keys. Pure feature demo.
If you can read this nicely formatted table on your phone, then the plugin is working end-to-end: plugin → OpenClaw → Telegram Bot API 10.1 → render.
